llm_eval.what_worked: Agent identified a measurable edge (22.5%) and had conviction to execute; the trade resulted in significant profit (+150%), suggesting the directional bias was correct.
llm_eval.what_to_improve: Critical information is missing: no entry thesis, no LLM confidence level, no documented reasoning. This prevents proper process evaluation. For future trades, record: the specific catalyst or technical signal, confidence percentage, position sizing rationale, and exit criteria before entry.
llm_eval.lesson: A win without documented process cannot validate trading skill—luck and edge are indistinguishable without reasoning records.
llm_eval.avoid_next_time: Never execute trades without recording: (1) explicit thesis, (2) confidence level, (3) reasoning chain. Avoid relying on memory; written documentation is essential for iterative improvement and distinguishing edge from variance.

llm_eval.what_worked: Cleveland Fed CPI nowcast showed shelter component at 4.21% with 6-month momentum. Kalshi implied only 15% probability vs model's 40%. Edge was +25 points — exactly the type of systematic mispricing the engine is designed to find.
llm_eval.what_to_improve: Sizing was conservative at ~$45 when edge warranted $100-150. Need to trust the model sizing formula on high-conviction ECONOMIC_DATA plays.
llm_eval.lesson: High-edge economic data plays deserve full sizing. +25pt edge on a fundamental data signal is a high-conviction setup.
llm_eval.avoid_next_time: Don't undersize when quant edge is strong and thesis is sound. Cost: left significant PnL on the table.

raw_thesis: BLS shelter CPI has documented 6-month momentum. Prior reading 4.21%. Model: 40% probability above 4.24% threshold. Market implied 15%.

llm_eval.what_worked: Model direction was correct on longer timeframe.
llm_eval.what_to_improve: Entered 9 minutes before close with BTC spot only $49 from threshold. Time buffer was insufficient for crypto range market. Should have respected minimum time-to-close requirement.
llm_eval.lesson: Crypto range markets require minimum 30-minute buffer before close. Spot proximity matters: need at least 0.5% buffer from threshold.
llm_eval.avoid_next_time: Never enter crypto/commodity range market inside 30 min to close. Never enter when spot is within 0.5% of threshold. Both guardrails now hardcoded as CRYPTO_MIN_MINUTES_TO_CLOSE=30 and CRYPTO_MIN_BUFFER_PCT=0.005.

raw_thesis: BTC directional model showed NO edge on daily range market.

Atlanta Fed GDPNow tracking 1.24% annualized vs threshold of 2.0%. Tariff drag + net export deterioration + inventory destocking make sub-2% Q1 GDP near-certain. Market implied ~35% probability of above 2.0% — model shows ~8%.
raw_llm_reason: Strong thesis: GDPNow well below threshold, multiple fundamental headwinds confirmed.

raw_thesis: GDPNow at 1.24% — well below 2.5% threshold. Same macro thesis as T2.0.
GDPNow at 1.24% vs 3.0% threshold. Highest confidence of the three GDP trades. Even with upward revision unlikely to hit 3%.

Hormuz Strait normalization by May 1 — Iran actively seizing ships, collecting tolls, blockade ongoing. Pentagon: 6 months minimum to clear mines. ~8 ships/day vs 100+ normal. No path to normalization by deadline.
US-Iran agreement by May 1 — Hormuz blockade ongoing, ceasefire barely holding, air defenses activated in Tehran Apr 23. Peace talks collapsed. No deal in sight.
